---
mode: agent
---
check again everything to be sure. No errors, no type, no lint, no browser console errors, flows all working, UI nice and tidy and aligned, UX intuitive, improvement etc. All sort of problems and issues. If you find any, think for a plan to fix, save the plan in .github/plans folder and create an issue in the repository with the plan. If you find no issues, just say "All good" and nothing else. Don't start anything else, ask me if you need more information or ask me if if you can proceed with the plan.
